mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (user_id, name, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.space_id) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS space_count FROM items i WHERE i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.space_id) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS space_count FROM items i WHERE i.external_id = #{externalId}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.space_id) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS space_count FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.space_id) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS space_count FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY
i.created_at ASC, i.id ASC
i.name ASC, i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC
i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
